basic_details.job_title: TIFR Balloon Facility Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 03 Scientific Assistant & Driver Posts

important_dates.raw: Last Date to Submit Application: 09 July 2026

age_limit.details: Scientific Assistant (B): Maximum 28 years Driver (B): Maximum 30 years Age relaxation as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma/B.Sc (Electronics) for SA, SSC + Driving License for Driver
qualification.details: Qualification (Scientific Assistant (B)) Full time Diploma in Engineering (Electronics/Electronics & Communication/Electronics & Instrumentation/Industrial Electronics) with 60% marks OR B.Sc in Electronics with 60% marks. Knowledge of computers required. 0-2 years experience. Desirable Experience Telecommunication, C/C++/Python programming, PCB designing, Microcontrollers, FPGA. Qualification (Driver (B)) SSC or equivalent, Valid Heavy Vehicle Driving License, Minimum 3 years accident-free driving experience in large cities, Physical fitness as per standards.

salary_details.details: Scientific Assistant (B): Pay Level 6, Stage 1 - Total Monthly Emoluments Rs. 73,020/- Driver (B): Pay Level 2, Stage 1 - Total Monthly Emoluments Rs. 39,970/-

selection_process: Scientific Assistant (B): Written Test and Personal Interview or Personal Interview only Driver (B): Physical Test and Trade Test
how_to_apply: Attach all required certificates and documents.
Send by post to Scientist-in-Charge, TIFR Balloon Facility, P.B. No.5, ECIL Post, Hyderabad - 500 062.

all_official_links.label: Download TIFR Balloon Facility Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TIFR Balloon Facility Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send the application by post is 09 July 2026. Applications received after this date will not be considered. Candidates must ensure timely postal delivery.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Scientific Assistant (B) in TIFR Balloon Facility?
faq.answer: Scientific Assistant (B) will get Pay Level 6 with Total Monthly Emoluments of Rs. 73,020/-. This is as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q3. What qualification is needed for Driver post in TIFR Hyderabad?
faq.answer: Candidates need SSC, valid heavy vehicle driving license, and minimum 3 years accident-free driving experience in large cities along with physical fitness standards.

faq.question: Q4. How to apply for TIFR Balloon Facility jobs 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent offline by post in the prescribed format with all supporting documents to the given Hyderabad address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Scientific Assistant posts?
faq.answer: Maximum age is 28 years for Scientific Assistant (B) posts. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the ABMP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the ABMP Recruitment 2026 is 24th July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in the ABMP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the posts of Consultant (IT), Consultant (Registry), and Consultant (Sr. PPS/PPS/PS) in the Adjudicatory Board for Major Ports.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant (IT) post?
faq.answer: For the Consultant (IT) post, candidates need to have a M.Tech / Masters Degree in Computer Science / Computer Application / Information Technology or M.Sc in Computer Science / Information Technology or B.E. / B.Tech in Computer Science / Information Technology from a recognized University / Institute.

faq.question: What is the age limit for applying to the ABMP Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Consultant posts is 64 years as on the closing date of application receipt. The engagement will not extend beyond the age of 65 years.

faq.question: What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The remuneration for the selected candidates will be calculated as 'Last Pay Drawn minus Basic Pension'. No additional increments or financial benefits will be provided during the contract period.

faq.question: What is the application mode for the ABMP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications for the ABMP Recruitment 2026 must be submitted online through the official website of ABMP.

faq.question: What is the experience required for the Consultant (Registry) post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Consultant (Registry) post must have a minimum of 10 years of experience in registry functions of High Courts, District Courts, Tribunals, or quasi-judicial bodies.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for the ABMP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the ABMP Recruitment 2026. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these consultant positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the submission of online applications. Eligible candidates may be called for a viva voce, and the selection will be conducted by a Selection Committee.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the 'Important Links' section of this article. You can also visit the official website of ABMP for more details.
